headline: EQT CORP (NYSE:EQT) Reports Q1 2026 Earnings: EPS Beat Overshadows Revenue Miss
summary: EQT Corp reports mixed Q1 2026 results, beating EPS estimates but missing revenue forecasts. The natural gas producer saw strong sales growth, yet shares dipped slightly.

raw.headline: EQT CORP (NYSE:EQT) Reports Q1 2026 Earnings: EPS Beat Overshadows Revenue Miss

headline: EQT (NYSE:EQT) Reports Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Natural gas producer EQT (NYSE:EQT) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 57% year on year to $3.38 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.33 per share was 7.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: EQT Q1 Adj. EPS $2.33 Beats $2.12 Estimate, Sales $3.136B Miss $3.221B Estimate
summary: EQT (NYSE:EQT) reported quarterly earnings of $2.33 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $2.12 by 9.91 percent. This is a 97.46 percent increase over earnings of $1.18 per share from the same period

headline: EQT ESOP Shelf Registration Raises Questions On Dilution And Dividends
summary: EQT Corporation filed a $1.9b shelf registration tied to its Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP), enabling a potential future equity offering. The filing gives NYSE:EQT flexibility to issue shares over time, subject to market conditions and corporate decisions. The ESOP focus brings employee ownership and incentives into the spotlight alongside the company’s capital structure. For investors watching NYSE:EQT, the shelf registration comes at a time when the stock trades at $57.0 and has...

headline: Stephens & Co. Maintains Overweight on EQT, Lowers Price Target to $73
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Mike Scialla   maintains EQT (NYSE:EQT) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $78 to $73.
